    <h1 {...{
      "id": "review--guidelines"
    }}>{`Review & Guidelines`}</h1>
    <p>{`If you are looking to distribute your plugin to the Adobe Creative Cloud Marketplace, you will need to submit it for review and follow our guidelines.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`Plugins submitted to the Creative Cloud Marketplace always go through a review process, designed to ensure that every product—whether free or paid—meets Adobe's quality standards.`}</p>
    <p>{`A dedicated team carefully audits and approves extensibility listings. To help avoid delays and keep the review queue moving smoothly, please ensure your plugin fully complies with our requirements.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`We aim to review your plugin within `}<strong parentName="p">{`10 business days`}</strong>{` of submission and will notify you whether it has been accepted or requires changes.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "review-criteria"
    }}>{`Review Criteria`}</h2>
    <p>{`The review team will assess your submission based on a variety of factors, including:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Branding and Trademark Compliance`}</strong>{`: proper use of Adobe trademarks, brand assets, and naming conventions`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Listing Quality`}</strong>{`: clear descriptions, valid links, appropriate subtitle, and support channel availability`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Functional Testing`}</strong>{`: UI behavior, button functionality, input handling, error feedback, and keyboard shortcuts`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Platform Compatibility`}</strong>{`: multi-architecture support, code signing, and installation behavior`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`External Services Integration`}</strong>{`: login/logout flows, test credentials, and service connectivity`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`User Experience`}</strong>{`: responsive layouts, loading indicators, scrolling behavior, and accessibility`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Performance`}</strong>{`: resource usage (CPU/RAM) and compatibility with host applications`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Localization`}</strong>{`: multi-locale support and keyboard compatibility`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Content Safety`}</strong>{`: harmful or unacceptable content policies`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Transparency`}</strong>{`: privacy policies, terms of service, and third-party dependencies`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Code Quality`}</strong>{`: presence of bugs, harmful code, or exposed developer tools`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "submission-checklist"
    }}>{`Submission Checklist`}</h2>
    <p>{`Check off the tasks in this list before submitting. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:ccintrev@adobe.com"
      }}>{`ccintrev@adobe.com`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "1-assets"
    }}>{`1. Assets`}</h3>
    <p>{`Ensure that all required assets are included and named correctly in your plugin submission, as per the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../listing/index.md"
      }}>{`Create Listing guide`}</a>{`, including:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Files`}</strong>{`: all required plugin files and dependencies`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Icons`}</strong>{`: custom-designed icons for all themes, resolutions, and display scales (no placeholder or default icons)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Screenshots`}</strong>{`: high-quality screenshots that accurately represent your plugin's functionality`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Release notes`}</strong>{`: clear documentation of changes and new features`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Testing information`}</strong>{`: comprehensive testing instructions and scenarios`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Test credentials`}</strong>{`: share login credentials, license keys, or test accounts with the review team so they can validate all functionality, including any paid or premium features`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`All visual assets must:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Be free of unauthorized Adobe logos or trademarks`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Display correctly in both light and dark themes`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Meet the required dimensions specified in Adobe's documentation`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Use unique icons for each panel (if your plugin has multiple panels)`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "2-metadata"
    }}>{`2. Metadata`}</h3>
    <p>{`Provide accurate and up-to-date information, including:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Plugin name`}</strong>{`: must be unique and use ASCII-only characters in the manifest`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Subtitle`}</strong>{`: must be relevant and clearly describe what the plugin does`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Description`}</strong>{`: must be clear, accurate, and localized where applicable; avoid vague or misleading language`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Version`}</strong>{`: current version number`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Author`}</strong>{`: developer or company name`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Contact information`}</strong>{`: valid email or support channel (email, GitHub, or website with contact form)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Website and support links`}</strong>{`: must open successfully and contain valid contact information`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Privacy policy and terms of service`}</strong>{`: must provide valid, accessible URLs`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Third-party dependencies`}</strong>{`: clearly mention if your plugin requires another application or service`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Pricing information`}</strong>{`: if your plugin is paid, offers a trial, or has a free tier, this must be clearly stated`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Trader information`}</strong>{`: required in the publisher profile if you wish to distribute your plugins in the EU region. See the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/compliance/"
        }}>{`EU Digital Services Act Trader Requirements`}</a>{` for more information.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="warning" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Avoid mentioning competitor names (e.g., Figma, Canva) in your plugin listing or materials.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "3-legal"
    }}>{`3. Legal`}</h3>
    <p>{`Ensure that all legal and licensing requirements are met, including:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Attribution`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Copyright`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Intellectual property rights`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "4-branding-guidelines"
    }}>{`4. Branding Guidelines`}</h3>
    <p>{`Review the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://developer.adobe.com/developer-distribution/creative-cloud/docs/guides/branding-guidelines"
      }}>{`Adobe Branding Guidelines`}</a>{` thoroughly to ensure your plugin and all related materials—including advertising, websites, and other media—comply with Adobe's branding standards.`}</p>
    <p>{`These guidelines regulate, among other things, the correct usage of:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The Adobe logo and other trademarks`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adobe product names (do not use Adobe trademarks like "Photoshop Enhancer" without written permission)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Approved badges and icons`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Social media presence`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Public profile and website content`}</li>
    </ul>
    <InlineAlert slots="header, text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Do not underestimate the importance of adhering to guidelines.`}</p>
    <p>{`Any violation may result in an immediate rejection of your submission. If you want to use Adobe brand assets, fill out the Trademark Request Form and email it to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:permissions2@adobe.com"
      }}>{`permissions2@adobe.com`}</a>{` and `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:brand@adobe.com"
      }}>{`brand@adobe.com`}</a>{`. Allow up to 2 weeks for processing. If you have any questions about the branding guidelines, please contact us at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "mailto:CCDeveloperMarketing@adobe.com"
      }}>{`CCDeveloperMarketing@adobe.com`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "5-platform-compatibility"
    }}>{`5. Platform Compatibility`}</h3>
    <p>{`Ensure your plugin works correctly across all supported platforms and architectures:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Multi-architecture support`}</strong>{`: for UXP Hybrid C++ plugins, test on Mac M1, Mac Intel, and Windows Intel`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Code signing`}</strong>{`: macOS plugins must be code signed and notarized with a valid certificate (minimum 1 year validity)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Installation`}</strong>{`: avoid OS-level warning prompts during installation; ensure no crashes during install or use`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Host application compatibility`}</strong>{`: test that your plugin does not crash or negatively impact host applications`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "6-functional-requirements"
    }}>{`6. Functional Requirements`}</h3>
    <p>{`Your plugin must meet the following functional standards:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Launch behavior`}</strong>{`: plugin must launch successfully via the Plugins menu, Plugins panel, or other entry points`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`User interface`}</strong>{`: no empty screens, blank panels, or clipped modal dialogs; every screen must display meaningful content`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Loading indicators`}</strong>{`: display progress feedback for any content or operations that take time to load`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Buttons and controls`}</strong>{`: all interactive elements must be visible, not overlap, and perform their expected actions`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Input handling`}</strong>{`: text fields must support English characters, special characters, numbers, and localized keyboards`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Error handling and feedback`}</strong>{`: provide clear user guidance when actions fail, selections are unsupported, or internet is disconnected; plugin must recover gracefully after reconnecting`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Keyboard shortcuts`}</strong>{`: must work as expected (except in applications where unsupported, such as InDesign v18.5 or Premiere Pro v25.6)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Scrolling behavior`}</strong>{`: scrollbars must appear when needed; content must be accessible without resizing the panel`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Responsive layout`}</strong>{`: plugin must work without requiring users to resize the panel`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`No developer tools`}</strong>{`: do not expose debug consoles or developer tools in production builds`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "7-external-services-integration"
    }}>{`7. External Services Integration`}</h3>
    <p>{`If your plugin connects to external services, ensure the following:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Test credentials`}</strong>{`: provide valid test login credentials or license keys in the "Notes to Reviewer" section`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Login and signup flow`}</strong>{`: users must be able to sign up or log in; if login is browser-based, the plugin must handle abandoned login gracefully and provide a link back to your website`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Logout functionality`}</strong>{`: users must be able to log out from within the plugin`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Service connectivity`}</strong>{`: handle network failures gracefully with appropriate user feedback`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "8-companion-apps"
    }}>{`8. Companion Apps`}</h3>
    <p>{`If your plugin uses a companion application:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The companion app must install successfully on all supported operating systems`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The plugin must communicate with the companion app successfully`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Monitor for abnormal CPU or RAM usage`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The plugin must not launch external applications (only browser links are allowed)`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "9-localization"
    }}>{`9. Localization`}</h3>
    <p>{`If your plugin supports multiple languages:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Test plugin functionality in all supported locales (Mac only for review purposes)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Ensure no string truncation occurs in any supported language`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Support localized keyboard layouts and input methods`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "10-performance-and-resource-usage"
    }}>{`10. Performance and Resource Usage`}</h3>
    <p>{`Your plugin must demonstrate responsible resource management:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Monitor and optimize CPU and RAM consumption`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Ensure the plugin does not cause performance degradation in host applications`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Avoid memory leaks or excessive background processing`}</li>
    </ul>

            "align": null
          }}>{`Review and align all assets with the Adobe Branding Guidelines. Remove or adjust any unapproved logos, icons, or references before resubmission.`}</td>

            "align": null

          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Verify that all UI components, scripts, and dependencies load correctly. Test the plugin in a clean installation of the host application.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Use of default/placeholder Icons`}</strong>{`: the plugin includes default icons or missing variants for supported themes and sizes.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Provide custom-designed icons for all required themes, resolutions, and display scales.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Non-functional buttons or silent failures`}</strong>{`: interactive elements such as buttons or menus do not trigger actions or feedback, resulting in unclear or broken user flows.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Ensure all interactive components trigger expected actions, provide user feedback and progress indicators. Implement proper error handling for failed operations.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`AI-generated content contains inappropriate material`}</strong>{`: AI features in the plugin generate or display explicit, offensive, or policy-violating content.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Apply robust content filtering or moderation to comply with Adobe's content safety policies.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Missing test data or credentials`}</strong>{`: reviewers cannot access the plugin's features because required test datasets, demo accounts, or credentials are not provided.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Include valid test data and credentials in the submission package, along with any access or setup instructions needed for review.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Clipped or invisible modal dialogs`}</strong>{`: modal dialogs are partially visible or appear off-screen, preventing user interaction.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Test modal dialogs at various panel sizes and ensure they are fully visible and properly centered.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Missing loading indicators`}</strong>{`: the plugin appears unresponsive during long operations without feedback to the user.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Add loading spinners, progress bars, or status messages for any operation that takes more than 1-2 seconds.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Poor input field handling`}</strong>{`: text fields fail with special characters, numbers, or localized keyboard input.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Test input fields with various character sets, including special characters and non-English keyboards. Implement proper validation and error messages.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Inadequate error messaging`}</strong>{`: the plugin fails silently or shows generic errors without guidance on how to resolve issues.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Provide specific, actionable error messages that guide users toward solutions. Handle edge cases like network failures gracefully.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Code signing issues`}</strong>{`: macOS plugins are not properly code signed or notarized, triggering security warnings.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Ensure plugins are signed with a valid Developer ID certificate and notarized through Apple. Certificate must be valid for at least 1 year.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Multi-architecture failures`}</strong>{`: UXP Hybrid C++ plugins crash or fail on specific architectures (M1, Intel, Windows).`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Test on all supported architectures: Mac M1, Mac Intel, and Windows Intel. Build separate binaries for each architecture if needed.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Exposed developer tools`}</strong>{`: debug consoles, developer menus, or testing features are accessible in the production build.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Remove all development and debugging interfaces before submission. Ensure production builds do not include dev dependencies.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Poor responsive design`}</strong>{`: plugin requires manual resizing to access controls or content; scrollbars don't appear when needed.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Implement responsive layouts that adapt to panel sizes. Ensure scrollbars appear automatically when content exceeds visible area.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">

            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Companion app integration issues`}</strong>{`: the plugin cannot communicate with its companion application, or the companion app causes excessive resource usage.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Test companion app integration thoroughly. Optimize resource usage and ensure reliable communication between plugin and companion app.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Localization problems`}</strong>{`: strings are truncated in non-English languages, or the plugin fails with localized keyboards.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null

          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Invalid or broken links`}</strong>{`: website URLs, support links, privacy policy, or terms of service links are broken or lead to incorrect pages.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Verify all links open successfully and direct users to the correct, relevant content.`}</td>

          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><strong parentName="td">{`Missing third-party dependency disclosure`}</strong>{`: the plugin requires an external application but does not inform users in the listing.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null

            "align": null

        </tr>

    </table>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "content-requirements"
    }}>{`Content Requirements`}</h2>
    <p>{`Plugins must adhere to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.adobe.com/legal/terms.html"
      }}>{`Adobe's General Terms of Use`}</a>{` and Content Policies found in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.adobe.com/trust/transparency.html"
      }}>{`Adobe Transparency Center`}</a>{`. For example, in the interests of user safety and acceptable standards, plugins must not:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Contain or generate illegal content (such as CSAM, content that encourages illegal drug use, etc.).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Contain or generate adult content (such as sexual content, nudity—consensual and non-consensual, gore, graphic gore or violence, or strong language).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Contain or generate hate speech or speech that promotes violence or bullying or cruel behavior to anyone.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Generate content that promotes, automates, or facilitates highly regulated activities (such as financial advice, medical advice or diagnosis, legal advice or documents, contracts).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Contain or generate code that is malicious (such as viruses, malware, spyware, etc.).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Participate in misinformation/disinformation campaigns.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Violate intellectual property rights, including copyright, of other persons and companies.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Automatically perform actions determined by AI that would be destructive or that can't be undone without explicit user consent.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "generative-ai-guidelines"
    }}>{`Generative AI Guidelines`}</h2>
    <p>{`If your plugin leverages generative AI to create content, it must adhere to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.adobe.com/legal/terms.html"
      }}>{`Adobe's General Terms of Use`}</a>{`, Developer Terms of Use and Content Policies found in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.adobe.com/trust/transparency.html"
      }}>{`Adobe Transparency Center`}</a>{`. Specifically:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must not generate illegal, adult, or hateful content.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must leverage filtering technologies to prevent the generation of prohibited content.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`You must thoroughly test your plugin to ensure that illegal content is not generated.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must not automate regulated activities (such as financial, medical, or legal advice) without proper disclaimers and user consent.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must not generate malicious code or participate in misinformation campaigns.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must not violate intellectual property rights of other persons and companies.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Your plugin must not perform destructive actions without explicit user consent.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="warning" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Before a plugin leveraging generative AI is approved for publication, you may be asked to certify that you have read these guidelines and agree to abide by them. If your plugin is found to be generating illegal content, your plugin will be removed. If you believe that we made a mistake in removing or restricting your plugin, then you may appeal that action through the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.adobe.com/trust/transparency.html"
      }}>{`Adobe Transparency Center`}</a>{`.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;
